settings.title: Warranty support
settings.text: Warranty coverage depends on brand, product category, and official distributor terms. Customers should keep receipts, serial numbers, accessories, and packaging when possible.

settings.title: Returns and exchanges
settings.text: Set clear rules for unopened items, defective items, inspection timelines, exclusions, and courier handling. Update this content to match your final store policy.

settings.title: Warranty & Returns
settings.intro: Help customers understand warranty coverage, service steps, and return conditions before they buy.
